hooks.command: [Windows.UI.Notifications.ToastNotificationManager, Windows.UI.Notifications, ContentType = WindowsRuntime] | Out-Null; [Windows.Data.Xml.Dom.XmlDocument, Windows.Data.Xml.Dom.XmlDocument, ContentType = WindowsRuntime] | Out-Null; $xml = New-Object Windows.Data.Xml.Dom.XmlDocument; $xml.LoadXml('<toast><visual><binding template="ToastText02"><text id="1">LandingUp</text><text id="2">Claude 작업 완료!</text></binding></visual></toast>'); $toast = New-Object Windows.UI.Notifications.ToastNotification $xml; [Windows.UI.Notifications.ToastNotificationManager]::CreateToastNotifier('LandingUp').Show($toast)
